topics.query_en: Super key vs candidate key vs primary key relational database
topics.query_ar: الفرق بين super key و candidate key و primary key قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Students often struggle to distinguish between the overlapping definitions of super keys and the minimal uniqueness requirement of candidate keys.

topics.query_en: Referential integrity and foreign keys database tutorial
topics.query_ar: التكامل المرجعي والمفاتيح الأجنبية قواعد البيانات referential integrity
topics.reason: Visualizing how foreign keys link tables and enforce consistency across multiple relations can be conceptually challenging for beginners.

topics.query_en: Relational model update operations and constraint violations
topics.query_ar: عمليات التحديث وانتهاك القيود في قواعد البيانات update operations constraint violations
topics.reason: Predicting cascading effects and identifying exactly which constraint is violated during insert, delete, or update operations requires deep systemic understanding.

topics.query_en: Relation schema vs relation instance state database
topics.query_ar: الفرق بين relation schema و relation state قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Beginners frequently confuse the static structural definition of a database (schema) with its dynamic data snapshot at a specific moment (state).

topics.query_en: Entity integrity constraint and null values relational model
topics.query_ar: قيد تكامل الكيان والقيم الفارغة قواعد البيانات entity integrity
topics.reason: Understanding the strict rules regarding when and why NULL values are restricted, specifically within primary key components, is a common stumbling block.
